page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance provides 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores, operating with 1.0 thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing at the core level.

The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per physical core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps, and the instance includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g6t.2xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of hyperthreading. The lack of local storage and GPU hardware makes it a cost-effective choice for standard application hosting, middle-tier enterprise applications, and general-purpose workloads that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, delivering 8 dedicated vCPUs across 8 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core. The instance features 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. With a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is designed for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, middle-tier enterprise systems, and web serving environments that require stable, non-shared compute performance.
